_meta.source: live CDP :9222 capture of https://www.upstage.ai/ + brand-resource-center
_meta.method: Runtime.evaluate getComputedStyle on document.documentElement + all elements + curated selector sweep
underlying_libraries_namespaced_in_token: _sub---untitled-ui--*  (Untitled UI Webflow library — color/gray ladder source)
_meta.note: Upstage's site is built on Webflow with two layered token systems (Untitled UI + Spark) plus Upstage-namespaced overrides (--colors--*, --style--*). Production tokens are the Upstage-prefixed values; underlying library vars are upstream defaults exposed to :root.

primary.role: Upstage Violet — interactive foreground / link / secondary-button text. Sampled on .button.is-secondary CTAs (Developer Console / Learn more) and 55× across the home surface. Source token: --_sub---spark-library--foreground-interactive: #5532fa (close variant). Live observed value: rgb(91, 82, 255). Brand purple equivalent.

primary_hover.role: Pressed/hover deepening of primary violet. Source: --_sub---spark-library--foreground-interactive-hover.

primary_deep.role: Deeper violet for emphasis or filled-button background variant. Source: --elements-webflow-library--secondary--color-1.

accent_solar.role: Solar yellow-green — single-use chromatic accent observed on hero motion/decoration surface. Source token family: --colors--green-yellow-50: #f6ffe5 → --colors--green-yellow-{50..900} ladder. The vivid #D2FF95 is the mid-step used as Solar-product visual signature.

body_gray.role: Default body and paragraph text. **Most frequent text color on the page (428 sampled elements).** Token: --colors--grey: #70757f. Used on light surfaces and as muted hero subhead on dark surfaces.

near_black.role: Page-level heading and high-contrast text on light surfaces. 58 occurrences in sample. Token: --_sub---untitled-ui--gray950 family / production root.

white.role: Text/UI on dark surfaces (213 occurrences). Source: --_sub---untitled-ui--white / --_sub---elements-webflow-library--neutral--100.

white_translucent_50.role: Muted-on-dark text (14 occurrences) — used for secondary copy inside dark hero sections.

near_white_subtle.role: Section break / subtle band background. Token: --colors--base--subtle: #f9fafb (= --_sub---untitled-ui--gray50 family).

footer_dark.role: Footer band background. Slightly violet-tinted near-black — not pure #000.

plum_decorative.role: Decorative dark surface for hero / scroll-pinned canvas. Token: --colors--grey-background: #3c043b. **Non-obvious choice** — a deep plum, not a neutral, paired with #D2FF95 Solar accent.

font_family.body_role: Body, navigation, button label, paragraph. **869 of ~930 sampled text elements (~93%) ship in Geist** — single-family discipline.
font_family.display_role: Hero H1 only — large statement type. Espeak is a custom display face (3 sampled hero phrases). Falls back to Arial.
font_family.rotating_industry_role: The rotating industry word inside the hero ('Insurance / Fi(nance) / Healthcare / Manufacturing') ships in the browser monospace stack — intentional **typographic shift mid-sentence** to mark the variable slot.
fallback_chain_observed: sans-serif (~50 elements on early non-hydrated paint)

weights_observed.500: 129 elements — buttons / nav links / 'Learn more' / footer columns
weights_observed.600: 15 elements — H1 hero, all section H2 headings

size_scale_observed.button: 16px / weight 500 (.button.is-secondary) and 18px / 500 ('Learn more →' inline arrow link)

typography.line_height_letter_spacing: Not heavily customised — Geist defaults dominate. Hero Espeak runs with display-tight tracking; body inherits browser defaults.

radius.binary_rule: **Sharp + 8px corner-soft, nothing else of substance.** 797 sampled elements ship `border-radius: 0` (cards / hero / sections / images); 134 ship 8px (buttons / hero-card chips / footer subscribe row). The 100%/50% values are reserved for icons and avatars only.

shadow_token_observed.role: Subtle violet-black 10% alpha — appears as the only ambient elevation in the underlying Webflow library.

elevation.production_use: **Effectively zero box-shadow on observed elements.** Depth on Upstage is achieved by background-color contrast (light vs plum #3C043B vs footer #191722) and by border/hairline edges, not by drop-shadow.

spacing.approach: Webflow class-driven sectional padding, not a numeric token scale exposed on :root. No `--space-*` ladder observed. Section vertical rhythm appears to use ~64-96px column gaps with consistent 16/24/32 internal step.

button_primary.background: transparent (text-led primary in hero) OR violet #5B52FF on filled variants

button_secondary.border: default light hairline or transparent in some contexts

link_inline_arrow.pattern: 'Learn more →' — text-color follows section surface (white on dark, violet on light), unweighted underline, 18px / weight 500
link_inline_arrow.frequency: Used as primary CTA throughout product/solution cards

motion.note: Motion tokens not extracted in this CDP pass — transitions inferred via observed hover backgrounds but exact durations / cubic-bezier curves not sampled. Flagged for UPDATE pass.
